title: tragacantha racemulosa
intro: Tragacantha racemulosa, also known as Oonopsis racemulosa, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of western North America. It possesses medicinal properties due to its root containing sesquiterpene lactones, which have shown anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Tragacantha racemulosa is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its potential medicinal properties.
